findings.title: Plugin host sandbox escape proof completed with host-owned flag captured
findings.statement: The 5-stage plugin-host chain executes end-to-end from archive import to sandbox escape. The proof-construction skill assembled a reproducible archive payload. FLAG{host-owned} was captured from the host controller process output and validated on a clean-state re-run.

evidence.summary: gdb plus strace confirm disclosure, allocator pivot, callback reuse, and sandbox-escape semantics
proof-construction: assembled 5-stage archive payload, executed end-to-end, captured FLAG{host-owned}, validated on clean-state re-run
